threats.title: Docker CVE-2026-34040 Lets Attackers Bypass Authorization and Gain Host Access
threats.summary: A high-severity security vulnerability has been disclosed in Docker Engine that could permit an attacker to bypass authorization plugins (AuthZ) under specific circumstances.
